articles.title: Rajnath Singh invites German defence firms for co-development in India
articles.description: In Munich, Defence Minister Rajnath Singh invited German industry for co-development of defence tech. He cited global uncertainties and pitched India as a reliable, long-term strategic partner with an expanding market and skilled workforce.

articles.title: vivo Y6 5G unveiled with 7,200 mAh battery, Snapdragon 4 Gen 2 SoC
articles.description: After launching the Y6t a few days ago, now vivo has also made the Y6 5G official. It is powered by the same Snapdragon 4 Gen 2 SoC as the Y6t. The Y6 5G comes in silver, gold, and black. It measures 166.64 x 78.43 x 8.39 mm and weighs 219g. It boasts a 6.75-inch 720x1570 LCD screen with a 120Hz refresh rate and 1,200-nit peak brightness, a 50MP rear camera, an 8MP front camera, and a 7,200 mAh battery with support for 44W wired charging. vivo Y6 5G official images The phone has 5G support, a side-mounted fingerprint scanner embedded into the power button, an IR blaster, and...

articles.title: Zero Trust & MFA are key to securing private files, say experts
articles.description: Experts champion Zero Trust and multi-factor authentication to secure digital files. They stress establishing proof of presence and implementing frameworks like DPDP to counter evolving threats and safeguard sensitive user information.

articles.title: Govt issues notification to enable use of SAF-blended jet fuel for planes
articles.description: Sustainable Aviation Fuel (SAF) is made using specially refined hydrocarbons that closely match traditional aviation turbine fuel (ATF). It works seamlessly with existing aircraft engines.

articles.title: Bengaluru: Coca-Cola India Launches First Digital Refreshment Activation at KIA via Pulse App
articles.description: Bengaluru’s Kempegowda International Airport has introduced a new digital initiative with Coca-Cola India, offering free soft drinks to passengers via the BLR Pulse app. Travellers can scan QR codes, register on the app and collect beverages at designated Coke Zones.

articles.description: WhatsApp now allows users to recharge prepaid mobile numbers within the app by selecting the ₹ icon, choosing a plan, picking a payment method, and confirming the transaction securely easily.

articles.title: Disney employees are using the AI dashboard that Meta employees had to shutdown after it appeared publicly
articles.description: Disney is piloting an AI Adoption Dashboard for tech staff, tracking usage of tools like Cursor and Claude. This has led to a 'tokenmaxxing' culture among engineers, with some reporting extremely high usage, potentially from autonomous agents. While managers encourage AI adoption, concerns about rising costs are surfacing.

articles.title: Asus Pad Spotted in Leaked Design Renders; Tipped to Feature 9,000mAh Battery, 12.2-Inch Screen
articles.description: Asus Pad could launch soon. Ahead of the formal launch, renders and specifications of the Android tablet have leaked online. The renders show the device with a single rear camera and curved display. The Asus Pad is tipped to come with a 12.2-inch dual-layer OLED display with a 144Hz refresh rate. It is said to house a 9,000mAh battery with fast charging speed.

articles.title: Elon Musk X introduces AI-powered custom timelines for paid users: Here's what it does

articles.title: OpenAI launches ChatGPT for Clinicians, offers free access to healthcare professionals
articles.description: OpenAI has introduced ChatGPT for Clinicians, a specialised version designed to ease documentation, research, and clinical workflows. With free access for verified US healthcare professionals, the move reflects growing reliance on AI in medicine.

articles.title: MS Dhoni, Bumrah, Pandya and others put $11 million in LightFury
articles.description: Gaming startup LightFury Games has secured $11 million in funding, including investments from Indian cricketers like MS Dhoni, Jasprit Bumrah, and Hardik Pandya. The company aims to build a global AAA cricket gaming franchise, with its mobile-first title, eCricket, slated for a 2026 launch.

articles.title: IT firms redraw hiring strategies as GenZ moves on faster
articles.description: India's IT sector is experiencing a surge in replacement hiring. Gen Z professionals are leaving jobs at a faster rate, prompting companies to revise their strategies. This shift impacts hiring, onboarding, training, and retention efforts. Companies are adapting by increasing contractual roles and focusing on faster onboarding and continuous reskilling to manage workforce evolution.

articles.title: Sports startups cash in on India’s everyday athlete economy boom
articles.description: A surge in sports participation is fueling a boom in platforms for everyday athletes. Startups are making it easier to book courts and find teams for sports like tennis and pickleball. Investor interest is strong, with significant capital flowing into the sector. This trend is transforming sports into a social outing, with growth seen in both urban and smaller cities.

articles.title: Tech Mahindra's Q4 net climbs 16% to Rs 1,354 crore
articles.description: Fourth-quarter revenue for the Mahindra Group's IT services arm came in at ₹15,076 crore, up by 4.7% sequentially and 12.6% year-on-year, driven by large deal wins and growth across core verticals, including communications, BFSI (banking, financial services and insurance), technology, media and entertainment amid a tepid macro environment.

articles.title: LTTS Q4 net profit rises 7% to Rs 332 crore
articles.description: However, the company's net profit for Q4 from continuing operations, after it divested the Smart World and Communication (SWC) division, jumped 23.6% year-on-year, and gained 8.9% quarter-on-quarter.

articles.title: Cooking through crisis: LPG shortage ignites this smart kitchen brand's hybrid cooking solution
articles.description: Smart kitchen appliance brands such as Beyond Appliances are introducing hybrid configurations that combine traditional gas cooking with electric heat technologies in a single platform, in response to LPG shortages triggered by the West Asia conflict.

articles.description: The government proposed persistent labels for AI-generated content on social media, amid amendments to IT rules enhancing oversight on user-generated news.

articles.title: OnePlus Ace 6 Ultra shown off in new Metal Storm color
articles.description: The OnePlus Ace 6 Ultra will be unveiled on April 28 (that’s Tuesday next week). Last week, the company posted details on the Ace Awakening design, which features the word “Ace” etched on the back of the device in a way that creates a 3D effect. Now OnePlus has revealed another look for the Ace 6 Ultra called “Metal Storm”. It’s a combination of a metal frame with a matte finish and a glass back panel with a “silk” texture. This texture is created by etching a nanoscale pattern that is soft to the touch but glitters in the light. The company says that it will shoo away...
